headline: A Look At Amgen (AMGN) Valuation As Tavneos Safety Concerns And Withdrawal Requests Escalate
summary: Amgen (AMGN) stock is in focus after safety concerns around its rare disease therapy Tavneos, including reported patient deaths in Japan, prompted regulators and partners to restrict new prescriptions and consider withdrawal in the U.S. See our latest analysis for Amgen. At a share price of $337.42, Amgen has seen its 90 day share price return fall 9.96%, even as its 1 year total shareholder return of 27.83% and 3 year total shareholder return of 70.14% point to stronger longer term...
